title: AI Tool schema does not support arrays
symptom: When trying to assign multiple users in ClickUp via the AI tool, a schema error occurs, and the assignee field remains blank.
applies_when: Using AI agent to create tasks in ClickUp
Assignees need to be an array of integers
not_this_if: Assignees are provided as a single integer or string
root_cause: The current implementation of the AI tool schema in n8n does not support array types, which leads to issues when trying to pass multiple user IDs as an array to ClickUp.
fix_steps: Modify the AI Tool to return a single number or a comma-separated string of user IDs.
Add a Function node to convert the comma-separated string into an array of integers.
In the ClickUp node, use the transformed array from the Function node.
agent_instruction: Implement the suggested workaround to transform user IDs for ClickUp.
